untranslatable_reason: Broadening Top pattern detection requires multi-bar swing point analysis (identifying expanding highs and lows over a specific lookback period) which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators. The success rate table and performance metrics are empirical data tied to pattern confirmation logic that requires custom pattern recognition beyond the allowed indicator set. Volume trend analysis parameters are also marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be operationalized.
translation_notes: Signal describes a technical pattern (Broadening Top) with directional breakout logic and empirical success rates by market regime. The core entry logic is simplified to basic breakout conditions (price exceeding prior bar extremes in both directions). Actual implementation requires: (1) Pattern detection logic to identify expanding price range over N bars, (2) Confirmation of breakout direction, (3) Regime-specific position sizing based on success rate table (53% bear vs unstated bull). Exit condition uses reversal of entry signal. Parameters like 'throwback_pullback_pct' and specific success rate tables cannot be translated to rule conditions.
